name: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc.
businessModelSummary: Martin Marietta Materials is a leading producer and supplier of aggregates (crushed stone, sand, and gravel) and heavy building materials used in construction and infrastructure projects. The company operates quarries and distribution facilities across the United States, selling directly to contractors, ready-mix concrete producers, and asphalt plants, with revenue driven by construction activity and infrastructure spending.
regulators: Surface Mining Control and Reclamation Act (SMCRA)
industryBodies: American Society for Testing and Materials (ASTM)
